benefits.description: Complete resolution of recurrent canker sores; went from at least one canker sore per month lasting ~7 days to zero canker sores over approximately 3.5 months (January to late April). Two canker sores returned on days 9-10 of a 10-day vacation when peptides were not taken.

protocol_notes: OP started GHK-Cu subq in January 2025. Had a canker sore at the time of starting which cleared up a few days later. No canker sores for approximately 3.5 months until stopping during a 10-day overseas vacation, at which point two canker sores formed on days 9-10.
